title: Matera CEO quoted in Felix Salmon's latest Axios article
excerpt: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, was quoted in Felix Salmon's most recent Axios article.
body: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, was quoted in Felix Salmon's most recent [Axios article](https://www.axios.com/2023/07/22/fednow-instant-payments-credit-cards).
